_comment: Predeclared orphan-retirement choices for TT8 dogfooding, so an unattended runner never stalls. Retiring an orphan is a product call; these fixtures pin the choice per orphan test. 'file_triage' = surface as a triage item, never auto-delete (R4/§7).

e2e/legacy.spec.ts::copies the launch co.rationale: FR-03.09 was retired by ADR; its e2e spec asserts a removed affordance

e2e/unmapped.spec.ts::renders a legacy w.rationale: no live FR maps; review candidate, not a stale-feature accusation — never auto-delete
